= Feature Reverse Analysis Template
:toc:
:sectnums:

== Scope

Feature name::
  <feature name>

Included::
  <confirmed included scope>

Excluded::
  <confirmed excluded scope>

Sources::
  * Code: <files or modules>
  * Jira: <ticket or "not used">
  * Confluence: <page or "not used">
  * User input: <prompt or clarification>

== Evidence Rules

Every factual statement must be backed by at least one source. Unsupported statements belong in assumptions or open questions.

== Required Output Files

`overview.adoc`::
  Business and technical overview of the feature.

`flow.adoc`::
  Main execution flow, branches, and failure paths.

`integrations.adoc`::
  External APIs, queues, events, services, and dependencies.

`data.adoc`::
  Data structures, storage, identifiers, and ownership.

`questions.adoc`::
  Open questions, contradictions, assumptions, and follow-up decisions.
